---
title: "Homeless Icons"
format: 
  html:
    css: weepeople.css
editor: visual
params:
  year: "2022-23"
  lea: "Dixon Unified"
  student_group: "homeless"
---

```{=html}
<style>
@font-face {
  font-family: 'weepeople';
  src: url('fonts/weepeople.ttf') format('truetype');
  font-weight: normal;
  font-style: normal;
}
</style>
```

```{r setup}
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(ggtext)
library(ggdist)

wee_letters <- c("Q","b","V", "h")

percent_indicators <- c("absenteeism", "graduation", "suspension", "college/career")

homeless <- read_csv("data/homeless.csv") %>% 
  filter(county_name == "Solano")
dashboard <- read_csv("data/ca_dashboard.csv")
enrollment <-  read_csv("data/enrollment.csv") %>% 
  select(-ends_with("code")) %>% 
  mutate(academic_year = paste0(reportingyear - 1, "-", reportingyear-2000))
solano_to_orange <- read_csv("data/solano_to_orange.csv") %>% 
  mutate(currstatus = if_else(indicator %in% percent_indicators,
                              paste0(currstatus, "%"), as.character(currstatus)))

homeless_in_lea <- 
  homeless %>%
  filter(academic_year == params$year,
         (district_name == params$lea & aggregate_level == "D" 
         & charter_school == "All" & dass == "All") |
           (aggregate_level == "S" & school_name == params$lea))

homeless_count_cumulative <-
  homeless_in_lea %>%
  filter(reporting_long == "Total Students") %>% 
  pull(homeless_student_enrollment) %>% 
  nth(1)

selected_to_orange <- 
  solano_to_orange %>% 
  filter(color == 1,
         academic_year == params$year,
         (school_name == params$lea & aggregate_level == "S") |
           (district_name == params$lea & aggregate_level == "D")) %>% 
  mutate(reporting_long = fct_relevel(as_factor(reporting_long), 
                                      "Homeless Youth",
                                      "Foster Youth")) %>% 
  arrange(reporting_long)

homeless_count <-
  selected_to_orange %>%
  filter(reporting_long == "Homeless Youth") %>% 
  pull(homeless_student_enrollment) %>% 
  nth(1)

total_enrollment <- 
  selected_to_orange %>%
  filter(reporting_long == "Homeless Youth") %>% 
  pull(cumulative_enrollment) %>% 
  nth(1)
```

```{r total_students}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

# Function to create rows of icons with better formatting
display_people_icons <- function(count, 
                                icons_per_row = 100, 
                                icon_size = 12,
                                icon_color = "slategray",
                                title = NULL) {
  
  # Sample random people icons
  people_icons <- sample(wee_letters, count, replace = TRUE)
  
  # Split into rows for better display
  rows <- ceiling(count / icons_per_row)
  
  # Create HTML output with proper spacing and wrapping
  output <- ""
  
  # Add title if provided - now OUTSIDE the weepeople font div
  if (!is.null(title)) {
    output <- paste0(output, 
                    "<h4 style='margin-bottom: 10px; font-family: sans-serif;'>", 
                    title, 
                    "</h4>")
  }
  
  # Start the weepeople div after the title
  output <- paste0(output, "<div style='font-family: weepeople;'>")
  
  # Add the rows of icons
  for (i in 1:rows) {
    start_idx <- (i-1) * icons_per_row + 1
    end_idx <- min(i * icons_per_row, count)
    
    # Get icons for this row
    row_icons <- people_icons[start_idx:end_idx]
    
    # Join with small spaces between icons
    row_text <- paste(row_icons, collapse = "")
    
    # Add row with styling
    output <- paste0(output, 
                    "<div style='font-size: ", 
                    icon_size, 
                    "pt; color: ", 
                    icon_color, 
                    "; margin-bottom: -3px; letter-spacing: -2px;'>",
                    row_text,
                    "</div>")
  }
  
  output <- paste0(output, "</div>")
  cat(output)
}

# Display the icons with a title
display_people_icons(
  count = total_enrollment,
  icons_per_row = 150,
  icon_size = 8,
  title = paste0("Total Student Enrollment: ", total_enrollment)
)
```

```{r homeless}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

# Function to create a combined display with different colors
display_combined_people_icons <- function(count_highlighted, 
                                         count_total,
                                         icons_per_row = 100, 
                                         icon_size = 8,
                                         highlight_color = "purple",
                                         regular_color = "slategray",
                                         title = NULL) {
  
  # Calculate the non-highlighted count
  count_regular <- count_total - count_highlighted
  
  # Generate all people icons
  highlighted_icons <- sample(wee_letters, count_highlighted, replace = TRUE)
  regular_icons <- sample(wee_letters, count_regular, replace = TRUE)
  
  # Combine all icons (highlighted first, then regular)
  all_icons <- c(highlighted_icons, regular_icons)
  
  # Calculate total rows needed
  rows <- ceiling(count_total / icons_per_row)
  
  # Create HTML output
  output <- ""
  
  # Add title if provided - outside the weepeople font div
  if (!is.null(title)) {
    output <- paste0(output, 
                    "<h4 style='margin-bottom: 10px; font-family: sans-serif;'>", 
                    title, 
                    "</h4>")
  }
  
  # Start the weepeople div after the title
  output <- paste0(output, "<div style='font-family: weepeople; line-height: 0.7;'>")
  
  # Process each row
  for (i in 1:rows) {
    start_idx <- (i-1) * icons_per_row + 1
    end_idx <- min(i * icons_per_row, count_total)
    
    # Get icons for this row
    row_icons <- all_icons[start_idx:end_idx]
    
    # Determine which icons in this row should be highlighted
    highlight_end_in_row <- max(0, min(count_highlighted - (i-1) * icons_per_row, icons_per_row))
    
    # Start a div for this row with proper line height and margin
    output <- paste0(output, "<div style='margin: 0; padding: 0; line-height: 0.8;'>")
    
    # If there are highlighted icons in this row
    if (highlight_end_in_row > 0) {
      # Add highlighted icons
      highlighted_text <- paste(row_icons[1:highlight_end_in_row], collapse = "")
      output <- paste0(output, 
                      "<span style='font-size: ", 
                      icon_size, 
                      "pt; color: ", 
                      highlight_color, 
                      "; letter-spacing: -2px;'>",
                      highlighted_text,
                      "</span>")
    }
    
    # If there are regular icons in this row
    if (highlight_end_in_row < length(row_icons)) {
      # Add regular icons
      regular_text <- paste(row_icons[(highlight_end_in_row + 1):length(row_icons)], collapse = "")
      output <- paste0(output, 
                      "<span style='font-size: ", 
                      icon_size, 
                      "pt; color: ", 
                      regular_color, 
                      "; letter-spacing: -2px;'>",
                      regular_text,
                      "</span>")
    }
    
    # Close the row div
    output <- paste0(output, "</div>")
  }
  
  output <- paste0(output, "</div>")
  cat(output)
}

# Display the combined icons with homeless students in purple
display_combined_people_icons(
  count_highlighted = homeless_count,
  count_total = total_enrollment,
  icons_per_row = 150,
  icon_size = 8,
  highlight_color = "purple",
  regular_color = "slategray",
  title = paste0("Student Enrollment: ", total_enrollment, " (Homeless: ", homeless_count, ")")
)

```

```{r group_enrollment}
#| include: false

group_enrollment <- 
  selected_to_orange %>% 
  select(reporting_long, cumulative_enrollment, 
         homeless_student_enrollment, students_to_orange) %>% 
  mutate(group_enrollment = if_else(reporting_long == "Homeless Youth", homeless_student_enrollment, cumulative_enrollment),
         cumulative_enrollment = total_enrollment) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = c(cumulative_enrollment, 
                        group_enrollment, 
                        homeless_student_enrollment),
               names_to = "count_type",
               values_to = "enrollment")


```

```{r other_groups}

suspended

# Display the combined icons with homeless students in purple
display_combined_people_icons(
  count_highlighted = homeless_count,
  count_total = total_enrollment,
  icons_per_row = 150,
  icon_size = 8,
  highlight_color = "purple",
  regular_color = "slategray",
  title = paste0("Student Enrollment: ", total_enrollment, " (Homeless: ", homeless_count, ")")
)


```
